narrative:
Precinct Mad River B (precinct in Champaign County) has 1,308 registered voters, with 47.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.3 percentage points.
